a = document.createElement('script');a.src = '/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/h/g/orchestrate/chl_page/v1?ray=9d2b700b19bdd8a7';window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash = location.hash === '' && location.href.indexOf('#') !== -1 ? '#' : location.hash;window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery = location.search === '' && location.href.slice(0, location.href.length - window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash.length).indexOf('?') !== -1 ? '?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=VA_wllShGx7O5ExYAatw3VlJEzZIysxyfaZgdwpJJ_k-1771899142-1.0.1.1-rIHLpHJUH3rBkzn8npkcWLhanRIlldj7_yyBePUVslk"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
